task: Review the current uncommitted Quickshell activity-border shader implementation for correctness and regressions. Focus on: GLSL rounded-rectangle perimeter math and SDF/AA/premultiplied alpha; Qt 6 ShaderEffect uniform layout and qsb usage; Nix qtshadertools build integration; QML lifecycle/performance; multi-monitor/scaling behavior. Inspect the actual diff and relevant files. Do not modify any project/source files. Return only concrete findings with severity and file:line references, plus whether it is safe to keep. Existing unrelated dirty changes are out of scope.
